name: Localization
summary: The Localization class is for translating strings in .NET dialogs.

methods.name: GetLocalizationFileFullPath
methods.summary: Returns localization file if found from environment

methods.name: GetText
methods.summary: Gets the translation for the current language. The translations are searched with the given identifier string.

methods.name: LoadAidFile
methods.summary: Loads the localization strings from an aid file. Several files may be used concurrently, just call LoadAidFile for each file. The translations are searched in the loading order and the first match is returned.

methods.name: LoadAilFile
methods.summary: Loads the localization strings from an ail file. Several files may be used concurrently, just call LoadAilFile for each file. The translations are searched in the loading order and the first match is returned.

methods.name: LoadFile
methods.summary: Loads the localization strings from a file. Several files may be used concurrently, just call LoadFile for each file. The translations are searched in the loading order and the first match is returned. The method uses the extension of the filename to identify the file type (".xml", ".aid" or ".ail").

methods.name: LoadXMLFile
methods.summary: Loads the localization strings from an xml file. Several files may be used concurrently, just call LoadXMLFile for each file. The translations are searched in the loading order and the first match is returned.

methods.name: RegisterLocalizationCallback
methods.summary: Registers a localization callback which is used to translate the registered control types.

properties.name: DefaultLocalizationFile
properties.summary: The path and name of the default localization file.

properties.name: DefaultLocalizationPath
properties.summary: The path and directory name where to find localization files.

properties.name: Language
properties.summary: Gets or sets the language that is currently used in Tekla Structures.
